name: Burgeoning Whirlflame
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>炎</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>えん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>渦</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>か</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>胎</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>たい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>動</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>どう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: When a Trap Card is activated: Send 1 "Laval" monster from your hand to the Graveyard; negate the activation and destroy it. If this card is in the Graveyard: You can banish 2 FIRE monsters from your Graveyard; add this card to your hand.
eff: When a Trap Card is activated: Send 1 "Laval" monster from your hand to the Graveyard; negate the activation and destroy it. If this card is in the Graveyard: You can banish 2 FIRE monsters from your Graveyard; add this card to your hand.

action: Sends from hand to Graveyard for cost
Returns itself from Graveyard to hand
mst: Negates the activation of Trap Cards
